creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 07/18/2011 12:07 AM, Roger Marquis wrote:
>> Well it would help if you describe in your PR what kind of problems
>> you are trying to fix.
> 
> OK, it fixes issues with the man page compiler, by adding the "-L" flag.
> 
>> tinyproxy has already been at version 1.8.2 for months, so
>> "Update to 1.8.2" is the wrong description.
> 
> Sorry, that's what the port command described it as.
> 
>> Patching both Makefile.am and Makefile.in is not necessary.
> 
> Yes it is, in my experience on different systems.

Please provide build log what is failing. And what are the differences.

> It has been tested and reviewed and is correct as submitted.

We are currently in the process of reviewing your patch.
